programme.title: Young Indiana Jones Passion for Life
programme.desc: On safari in British East Africa in September 1910 ten year old Indiana Jones befriends a Massai boy named Meto who helps him in his search for the little seen Fringe-Eared Oryx for former US President Teddy Roosevelt From there on he and his family and tutor travel to Paris France where Indy meets a young Norman Rockwell and gets involved in a quarrel between the painters Edgar Degas and Pablo Picasso The young American boys get a fascinating insight into modern art as Picasso schemes to one up the old master Degas

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Link and Zelda help the N team in building a mechanical dragon the purpose of which is to help them sneak in Dragons Den and put a stop to Dragonlords evil plan of hatching a deadly golden dragon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Following an Elvis sighting to The Springwood Hotel a tabloid reporter finds that the phony stories that he writes come true Meanwhile an amnesiac has a terrifying dream that he committed murder before losing his memory

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The various unlucky owners of a strange bag of cocaine are followed over the course of a night

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Successful romance novelist Claudia returns to her small hometown of Bolton to attend her high school reunion Claudia gets involved in a steamy affair with handsome young resident stud Lance However trouble materializes in the form of jealous and sinister ex-boyfriend turned local sheriff Lee

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Knight 303
programme.desc: Knight 303

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki learns beauty is only skin deep after she falls for a mysterious movie star who relies on an antique makeup case

programme.title: Mchale 304
programme.desc: Mchale 304

programme.title: Mchale 309
programme.desc: Mchale 309

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers grandpa offers pointers on drilling a platoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa pretends to be able to read so he can vote against an uppity female politician

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: When US athletes are injured Hymie turns into a one man track team to help the US win

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A KAOS operative imitating the President calls the Chief He orders the Chief to step down and gives the Chiefs job to Max KAOS also infiltrates CONTROL by planting their man Brady to CONTROL

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men must destroy a German anti-aircraft artillery unit so that the Allies can send in a bombing raid on Hitlers birthday

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have stolen a gold shipment from the French and Hogan must convince Klink to have it moved to the safety of Stalag 13

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Bullwinkle 532
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 532

programme.title: Bullwinkle 104
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 104

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Tomboy Rosemary Rocky Simpson Melissa Gilbert has a shipboard romance with teenager Norman Jimmy Baio; Julies Lauren Tewes parents Betty Garrett and Norman Fell break the news that they are getting a divorce; two prudes Marion James Coco and Patricia Dody Goodman are booked into the same cabin because Marion is a man who has a female name

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules 205
programme.desc: Hercules 205

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Elijah Good a doctor from an Amish community asks Boone for help with some unexpected deaths They might have to do with a Taelon-related disease

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A young Morthren rebels against his people so runs away to live amongst humans and ends up becoming friends with Debi

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russells presumed-dead husband mysteriously reappears on a reconnaissance mission to a nearby planet

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A political candidate for Governor bases much of his campaign on libelling the Barkley family

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone pursues a killer who shot an officer about to retire in three days; guests Tim OConnor Eileen Heckart

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Chopping Mall

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Adrian Miles is a veteran in the Ring but will it be enough against Miles Anstead at HK51. This fight ends with a Tap Out and a lip injury from Adrian Miles. Brian Crowe is fighting his first fight against Will Woo. He takes some good hits to the forehead, and hurts his foot and thumb. Dr. Murray Heber helps both fighters with their post fight medicals.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.

programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Neetra manages to get a message out regarding her planet Tekka Monster Minds are about to attack to acquire their powerful fuel miran to power his missiles The Vertim and Batim colonies rival each other for control of the pyramid made of miran

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Lost and dangerously low on fuel the Lightning League searches for Gate World a legendary gateway to any spot in the universe Gillian adapts the scanner and the Pride lands in the centre of some stonework on a beautiful planet

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Bruce Sato encounters a man suffering from a fever in the Alaskan snow and is soon infected with the same mysterious disease Matt assembles MASK to find the cure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Professor Hillary is about to decipher ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs that lead to the Golden Scarab with the secret to life itself But a mummy Sly Rax in disguise steals the hieroglyph tablet during the night

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes
